title: Lighthouse Performance Report for strolid.com
summary: This document presents a Lighthouse audit report for strolid.com, detailing performance, accessibility, best practices, and SEO scores, along with specific metrics, insights, and diagnostics for improvement. The website achieved high scores in Performance (92), Accessibility (90), Best Practices (77), and SEO (85).
